title: Bar Chart
description: A powerful and customizable bar chart component for displaying categorical data with interactive features, animations, and responsive design.

showcase.title: Bar Chart Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive bar chart demonstrating various features and configurations

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple bar chart with basic configuration

sections.title: Axis Configuration
sections.description: Bar chart with custom axis labels and rotation

sections.title: Animation Effects
sections.description: Bar chart with custom animation duration and easing

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Bar chart with custom colors and styling options

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Bar chart with click events and interactive tooltips

sections.title: Size Variations
sections.description: Bar charts in different sizes for various use cases

sections.title: Clustered Data
sections.description: Bar chart with clustered/grouped data structure

types.title: AXBarChartComponent
types.description: Bar Chart Component - Renders data as vertical bars with interactive hover effects and animations

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The root native element. Inherited from NXComponent

events.name: barClick
events.description: Emitted when a bar is clicked

methods.name: createChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates the bar chart SVG and renders all elements
 */
createChart(): void
methods.description: Creates the bar chart SVG and renders all elements

methods.name: updateChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the chart when inputs change
 */
updateChart(): void
methods.description: Updates the chart when inputs change

methods.name: cleanupChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Cleans up chart resources
 */
cleanupChart(): void

methods.name: getLegendItems
methods.content:
/**
 * Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface
 * Returns legend items based on the chart data
 */
getLegendItems(): AXChartLegendItem[]
methods.description: Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface - Returns legend items based on the chart data

methods.name: highlightSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface
 * Highlights a specific bar by ID
 */
highlightSegment(id: string | null): void
methods.description: Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface - Highlights a specific bar by ID

methods.name: toggleSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface
 * Toggles visibility of a bar by ID
 * @returns New visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)
 */
toggleSegment(id: string): boolean
methods.description: Implementation of AXChartLegendCompatible interface - Toggles visibility of a bar by ID. Returns new visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)

tokens.name: --ax-comp-bar-chart-labels-color
tokens.description: Color for axis labels in option (X/Y axis titles). Applied with 0.7 opacity where needed.

tokens.name: --ax-comp-bar-chart-data-labels-color
tokens.description: Color for data value labels displayed above each bar.

tokens.name: --ax-comp-bar-chart-grid-lines-color
tokens.description: Color for grid lines. Applied with 0.2 opacity.

tokens.name: --ax-comp-bar-chart-bg-color
tokens.description: Background color for the chart area.

types.title: AX_BAR_CHART_CONFIG
types.description: Default configuration token providing effective AXBarChartOption values

props.name: showDataLabels
props.description: Whether to show data value labels above each bar

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: rotateXAxisLabels
props.description: Control X-axis label rotation: true=always rotate, false=never rotate, 'auto'=intelligent calculation

props.name: barWidth
props.description: Percentage of available width to use for each bar

props.name: cornerRadius
props.description: Radius of bar corners in pixels

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in ms
